view.title: Validate explicit UC need #6
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for receipt and refund logic per payer.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 6 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for receipt and refund logic per payer.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for receipt and refund logic per payer.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Receipt and refund logic per payer', but the evidence provided does not include specific details about how receipts and refunds are managed for each individual payer. While the linked use case mentions that refunds route back to each original payer, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating the implementation of this logic or how it is tracked in the system. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
